steps.title: Isolate the x-squared term
steps.content: Add 40 to both sides: $$8x^2 - 40 + 40 = 32 + 40$$, which simplifies to $$8x^2 = 72$$. Divide both sides by 8: $$x^2 = \frac{72}{8} = 9$$.

steps.title: Solve for x and select the positive solution
steps.content: Take the square root of both sides: $$x = \pm\sqrt{9} = \pm 3$$. The problem asks for the positive solution, so $x = 3$. This matches choice A — A is correct.
